67.reason: [The second polynomial input loop does not handle newline-terminated input correctly; it reads until EOF instead of stopping at the end of the second line, which causes incorrect behavior when input has only two lines.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The second polynomial input loop does not handle newline-terminated input correctly; it reads until EOF instead of stopping at the end of the second line, which causes incorrect behavior when input has only two lines.]
